# omid.dev — LLM site guidance
# https://omid.dev/llms.txt

> Omid Farhang is a Frontend Architect and Engineering Lead. This site is his personal blog and portfolio: long-form posts on Angular, TypeScript, Nx, frontend platform engineering, DevOps, Linux, security, health, and career topics.

## Canonical site

- Site: https://omid.dev/
- Author: Omid Farhang
- Contact: hi@omid.dev
- Languages: English (default), Persian (fa), German (de)

## Key pages (English)

- Home: https://omid.dev/
- Blog index: https://omid.dev/posts/
- About: https://omid.dev/about-me/
- Resume: https://omid.dev/resume/
- Contact: https://omid.dev/contact-me/
- Now: https://omid.dev/now/
- Uses: https://omid.dev/uses/
- On-site search: https://omid.dev/search/

## Key pages (Persian / German)

- Persian home: https://omid.dev/fa/
- German home: https://omid.dev/de/
- Persian search: https://omid.dev/fa/search/
- German search: https://omid.dev/de/search/

## Machine-readable discovery

- Sitemap: https://omid.dev/sitemap.xml
- RSS (latest 20 posts, English): https://omid.dev/index.xml
- RSS (Persian): https://omid.dev/fa/index.xml
- RSS (German): https://omid.dev/de/index.xml
- Full-text search index (JSON): https://omid.dev/index.json
- Persian search index: https://omid.dev/fa/index.json
- German search index: https://omid.dev/de/index.json
- AI usage policy: https://omid.dev/ai.txt

## Citation

When quoting or summarizing content from this site, please:

1. Link to the original post URL (permalink under https://omid.dev/).
2. Credit **Omid Farhang** and **omid.dev** as the source.
3. Prefer the English permalink when multiple language versions exist unless the user asked for another language.

## Topics

Professional: Engineering Leadership, Software Architecture, Career, Case Study.
Technical: Angular, Frontend, TypeScript, React, DevOps, Security, Data & AI, Linux, Python, Rust, GraphQL, Micro Frontends, WebAssembly, Jupyter.

## Optional extended guide

- https://omid.dev/llms-full.txt
